languages.text: {n}На мгновение Себериан задумывается, но затем благосклонно кивает — аугменты в его позвонках звонко клацают.{/n} "Хорошо, оставайтесь. На кону решающая битва, и как воину, верному династии, я дозволяю вам право голоса на этом совете".

traits.locale_text: "Явиться сюда без приглашения — для этого нужны и смелость, и порода. Докажите свою пользу на поле боя, и я запомню ваше имя".

languages.text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."
languages.original_text: {n}На мгновение Себериан задумывается, но затем благосклонно кивает — аугменты в его позвонках звонко клацают.{/n} "Хорошо, оставайтесь. На кону решающая битва, и как воину, верному династии, я дозволяю вам право голоса на этом совете".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

{n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

{n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安沉思片刻，随后仁慈地点头同意，脊柱上的植入物发出清晰的咔哒声。{/n}“很好，你可以留下。此战关系重大，既然你自称是忠于王朝的战士，我便允许你在议会中发言。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安沉思片刻，随后仁慈地点头同意，脊柱上的植入物发出清晰的咔哒声。{/n}“很好，你可以留下。此战关系重大，既然你自称是忠于王朝的战士，我便允许你在议会中发言。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian réfléchit un instant, puis acquiesce avec bienveillance, laissant résonner le cliquetis des augmentations dans ses vertèbres.{/n} « Très bien, vous pouvez rester. Nous sommes à la veille d'une bataille décisive, et en tant que {mf|combattant|combattante} fidèle à la dynastie, je veux bien vous accorder une voix dans ce conseil. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian réfléchit un instant, puis acquiesce avec bienveillance, laissant résonner le cliquetis des augmentations dans ses vertèbres.{/n} « Très bien, vous pouvez rester. Nous sommes à la veille d'une bataille décisive, et en tant que {mf|combattant|combattante} fidèle à la dynastie, je veux bien vous accorder une voix dans ce conseil. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian piensa un momento y asiente, benevolente. Los aumentos de su columna vertebral emiten un traqueteo audible.{/n} «De acuerdo, puede quedarse. Se acerca una batalla decisiva y, como guerrer{mf|o|a} fiel a la dinastía, le daré voz en este consejo».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian piensa un momento y asiente, benevolente. Los aumentos de su columna vertebral emiten un traqueteo audible.{/n} «De acuerdo, puede quedarse. Se acerca una batalla decisiva y, como guerrer{mf|o|a} fiel a la dinastía, le daré voz en este consejo».

languages.text: {n}Bir an düşünen Seberian'ın omurgasındaki ogmentlerden duyulabilir bir tıklama sesi geliyor, sonrasında kabulünü belirten bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ, kalabilirsin. Belirleyici bir savaşın eşiğindeyiz. Hanedanlığa sadık bir savaşçı olarak sana bu konseyde söz hakkı tanıyacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir an düşünen Seberian'ın omurgasındaki ogmentlerden duyulabilir bir tıklama sesi geliyor, sonrasında kabulünü belirten bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ, kalabilirsin. Belirleyici bir savaşın eşiğindeyiz. Hanedanlığa sadık bir savaşçı olarak sana bu konseyde söz hakkı tanıyacağım."

languages.text: {n}Seberian überlegt einen Augenblick, nickt dann aber wohlwollend, wobei die Augmentationen in seinem Rückgrat hörbar klicken.{/n} "Schön, schön, Ihr dürft bleiben. Wir stehen vor einer entscheidenden Schlacht, und als {mf|treuer Krieger|treue Kriegerin} der Dynastie gewähre ich Euch eine Stimme im Rat."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian überlegt einen Augenblick, nickt dann aber wohlwollend, wobei die Augmentationen in seinem Rückgrat hörbar klicken.{/n} "Schön, schön, Ihr dürft bleiben. Wir stehen vor einer entscheidenden Schlacht, und als {mf|treuer Krieger|treue Kriegerin} der Dynastie gewähre ich Euch eine Stimme im Rat."

languages.text:
{n}セベリアンはしばらく考え込んだ後、首を振って慈悲深い同意を示した。背中の強化パーツがクリックと音を立てて動く。{/n}
「承知しました。あなたは残るでしょう。決戦が目前に迫っており、王朝に忠実な戦士として、この会議であなたの意見を聞くことにします。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian ponders for a moment, but then nods in benevolent agreement, the augments in his spine clicking audibly.{/n} "Very well, you may remain. A decisive battle is at stake, and as a warrior loyal to the dynasty, I will grant you a voice on this council."

traits.locale_text:
{n}セベリアンはしばらく考え込んだ後、首を振って慈悲深い同意を示した。背中の強化パーツがクリックと音を立てて動く。{/n}
「承知しました。あなたは残るでしょう。決戦が目前に迫っており、王朝に忠実な戦士として、この会議であなたの意見を聞くことにします。」
